title: Implement LLM context audit record schema and S3 upload

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
## Scope

Create Plexus infrastructure for capturing and storing LLM context audit records.

## Implementation

**New file**: `plexus/console/llm_context_audit.py`
- `LLMContextAuditRecord` dataclass with fields:
  - procedure_id, session_id, trigger_message_id, run_id
  - agent_name, turn_index, call_index, call_type
  - messages (exact list sent to model)
  - model_config, tool_config, token_stats
  - timestamps, latency_ms
  - compaction_metadata (optional)

**Extend**: `plexus/reports/s3_utils.py`
- `upload_llm_context_audit()` function
- S3 key pattern: `console-contexts/{session_id}/turn_{turn_index}_call_{call_index}.json`
- Add 14-day lifecycle policy for `console-contexts/` prefix

**Extend**: `plexus/console/chat_runtime.py`
- Update ChatMessage creation to accept `context_artifact_keys: List[str]`
- Merge keys into metadata.contextArtifacts array
- Add `fetch_llm_context_audit(s3_key)` helper

## Dependencies

None - foundational infrastructure.

## Testing

Unit tests for:
- LLMContextAuditRecord serialization to JSON
- S3 upload returns correct key format
- ChatMessage metadata merge preserves existing fields
- Artifact retrieval and parsing

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
## Completed

Implemented LLM context audit infrastructure in three locations:

**New file: `plexus/console/llm_context_audit.py`**
- `LLMContextAuditRecord` dataclass with full invocation metadata
- `upload_llm_context_audit()` — uploads to `console-contexts/{session_id}/turn_{n}_call_{n}.json`
- `fetch_llm_context_audit()` — downloads and parses for debugging
- `_s3_key()` sanitizes colons and slashes in session IDs to avoid unintended S3 path nesting

**Modified: `plexus/console/chat_runtime.py`**
- Added `record_audit_keys_on_message()` — merges `contextArtifacts` into ChatMessage metadata via `updateChatMessage` mutation

**New file: `plexus/console/test_llm_context_audit.py`**
- 11 tests covering serialization, round-trip, key sanitization, upload/fetch, and metadata merge

All 41 console tests green. Committed as `8b26b483`.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
## Reverted

Reverted commit 8b26b483 in favor of CloudWatch structured logs approach.

**Rationale**: S3 audit artifacts introduced sensitive data persistence concerns (PII, API keys, internal system details) with 14-day retention window. CloudWatch provides observability without long-term storage of potentially sensitive context.

**Revert commit**: 4cd909fa

**Next steps**: Will implement CloudWatch structured logging in plx-068711 (ConsoleAgent wrapper) as part of the core fix. S3 artifacts can be added later if needed after validating the CloudWatch approach.
